name: Three-Way Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Let cream cheese and cheddar cheese stand at room temperature until softened.
2. In a mixer bowl, combine cheese, onion, milk, and Worcestershire sauce; beat with an electric mixer until fluffy.
3. Divide the mixture into thirds, about 1 cup each.
4. To one portion, beat in blue cheese.
5. To a second portion, stir in the garlic powder.
6. Shape each portion into a ball; chill for at least 30 minutes until slightly firm.
7. Roll the blue cheese ball in snipped parsley.
8. Roll the garlic cheese ball in chopped pecans.
9. Roll the plain cheese ball in black pepper.
10. Chill for at least 1 hour more until cheese balls are firm.
11. Serve with crisp crackers. Makes 3 cheese balls.
